backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that defines an Enquiry type, stores submitted enquiries in a list, and exposes submitEnquiry (update) and getAllEnquiries (query) methods. Also includes blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that LocationSection.tsx was updated to use a correct Google Maps embed URL pointing to Akhnoor Palace, Jammu coordinates, with the Get Directions button linking to the specified maps URL.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components like Header, HeroSection, ProductCategories, LocationSection, ContactForm, and others for the Dwarka Bartan Store site.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base file defining CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens) for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Dwarka Bartan Store site with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, Google Fonts preconnect for Playfair Display and Inter, and a root div for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles all page sections in order, including FestiveOfferBanner, Header, HeroSection, ProductCategories, KitchenUtensils, HouseholdProducts, WhyChooseUs, CustomerReviews, LocationSection, ContactForm, Footer, and floating UI elements.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Contact form component with name, phone, message, and callback checkbox fields; validates input, submits to the backend canister via useSubmitEnquiry, and opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message on success.
Displays five customer testimonial cards with animated star ratings triggered by IntersectionObserver on scroll, each card fading and sliding in with a staggered delay.
Displays a modal dialog offering a bulk order WhatsApp discount when the user moves their mouse out of the viewport (desktop) or after 30 seconds on mobile, shown only once per session.
frontend/src/components/FestiveOfferBann: A dismissible top banner announcing a limited-time festive offer with a clickable phone number link, hidden after the user clicks the close button.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: A fixed floating action button linking to WhatsApp with a pulsing animation, positioned at the bottom-right of the screen.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, product category links, and call/WhatsApp CTA buttons for Dwarka Bartan Store.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the store logo, desktop nav links, a call CTA button, and a mobile slide-out sheet menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with headline, trust badges, call/WhatsApp/directions CTA buttons, and summary stats for Dwarka Bartan Store.
frontend/src/components/HouseholdProduct: Displays a single household product (colorful plastic dustbins) in a centered card with an image, description, and a WhatsApp enquiry button.
Displays a grid of featured kitchen product cards (e.g., Milton casseroles, wooden trays, water bottles) with images, descriptions, and WhatsApp inquiry buttons linking to a predefined phone number.
Renders a store location section with an embedded Google Maps iframe, address, phone number, and business hours, with an intersection-observer-based fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/MobileCallBar.ts: A fixed bottom call-to-action bar visible only on mobile devices that links directly to the store's phone number via a tel: href.
frontend/src/components/ProductCategorie: Renders an animated grid of six product category cards (e.g., stainless steel utensils, pressure cookers, gift items) each with an image, description, and a WhatsApp inquiry button.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Displays a 'Why Choose Us' section with five animated reason cards highlighting store strengths, plus a bottom call-to-action banner with a phone link.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and exposing login status flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitEnquiry mutation hook that calls the backend actor's submitEnquiry method with user-provided contact details and invalidates the enquiries query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for a gold/steel gray color palette in light and dark modes, and adds utility classes for gradients, shadows, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom gold/steel color palettes, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, display/body font families, custom shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 19) describing the Dwarka Bartan Store business website, its architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and build requirements for a kitchen utensils store in Akhnoor, J&K.
